context_text:
SMILE INDEX: 84
WINDOW: 1257.733s to 1294.633s (smile at 1277.733s to 1279.633s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[1243.620-1284.090] interviewee: I did not know what to do. About two, three days being at home at Katowice, my father tells me, you know, your former boss in the pharmacy in Tarnowiec, he's looking for you, because he doesn't speak German, only Polish. And he cannot communicate with the German military.
[1284.090-1317.750] interviewee: He had to deliver to the German hospital medications. And he couldn't communicate with them. So he said, why don't you go to Auschwitz?

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
he doesn't speak German,
